name: Hummus Bi Tahini (Chick Pea & Sesame Puree)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash chick peas well and cover with the water, soaking for 12 hours or overnight.
2. Gently boil in the soaked water, adding 1 teaspoon of salt; cook until very tender (about 3 hours total).
3. Drain and reserve some cooking liquid and a tablespoon of peas.
4. Press peas through a sieve or food mill, using about 2 tablespoons of reserved cooking liquid to help remove skins.
5. Slowly blend tahini and most lemon juice into the puree.
6. Crush garlic with a pinch of salt in a mortar; add to the puree and adjust flavor and consistency as needed using lemon juice or cooking liquid, and salt.
7. Serve hummus in a shallow dish, swirling it with the back of a spoon. Pour olive oil in the center and garnish with reserved chick peas, chopped parsley, and a sprinkle of paprika or cayenne pepper. Makes 3 cups. Cooking time: 3 hours.
Note:
- Puree peas to separate skins before adding them to the container or processor bowl with remaining ingredients.
- Blend or process until thick and smooth.
